
---
title: Modules
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Modules}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

# Modules

`camtrapReport` is designed as a modular and extensible workflow. Analytical outputs are generated through independent modules that can be combined within a report.

## Module-based design
